title: Structural insights into the triple agonism at GLP-1R, GIPR and GCGR manifested by retatrutide
study_design: structural biology and receptor pharmacology study
population: receptor complexes and in-vitro pharmacology systems
key_results: Cryo-electron microscopy and mutational analyses described retatrutide recognition at GLP-1R, GIPR and GCGR.
limitations: Structural and in-vitro findings do not directly quantify human clinical benefit or risk.
investigational_status_notice: Retatrutide remains investigational and is not approved for public use.
